source_paper.title: Paper Title (Original Language)
source_paper.doi: DOI (Only if explicitly stated in the text. Leave empty if unknown. Do NOT search the web as it will be auto-completed by the API)

content.en: Text of the knowledge element (Summarized in English. MUST include important numerical values and specific methods)
content.local: Translated summary in the language specified by PAPER_MEMORY_LANGUAGE

notes.element_type: MUST be EXACTLY one of: background, method, result, discussion, conclusion, insight, limitation, future_work, definition, other

context.en: Explanation of the context in which this knowledge element is important (in English)
context.local: Explanation in the language specified by PAPER_MEMORY_LANGUAGE
